title: lasthenia burkei
intro: Lasthenia burkei, also known as Burke's goldfields, is a rare annual plant species native to the southwestern United States. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been traditionally used to treat wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Lasthenia burkei include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to support immune function. Herbal preparations of Lasthenia burkei can be made into teas, tinctures, or salves for topical application, and it is often used in traditional medicine to support skin health and wound healing.
